summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustLayer AI validation tool. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend demo mode functional with minor data discrepancies, all UI interactions working properly.

minor_bugs.issue: Excel file upload simulation fails - expects real Excel format
minor_bugs.impact: Excel upload feature not properly tested, but CSV upload works

minor_bugs.issue: Too permissive CSV validation - accepts malformed CSV data
minor_bugs.impact: Invalid CSV data gets processed instead of rejected

data_discrepancies.issue: Trust score shows varying values (18, 20, 21, 34) instead of consistent 34
Claims count shows 32 instead of expected 16
data_discrepancies.impact: Double the expected number of claims in demo

data_discrepancies.issue: Filter counts don't match expected demo values (Wrong: 14 vs expected 7, Verified: 8 vs expected 4)
data_discrepancies.impact: Demo filter results inconsistent with requirements

passed_tests: Backend API health check returns correct 'TrustLayer API' message
CSV file upload works with proper response structure (columns, preview_rows, all_rows, total_rows)
Empty file upload properly returns 400 error
Get validations endpoint returns empty list (expected for fresh system)
Demo mode loads and shows results dashboard
Claim card expansion works - cards expand to show details
Filter functionality works - can filter by Wrong, Verified, All
Navigation works - New Validation button resets to data connection page
Analysis sections present - Missing Context, Hidden Assumptions, Alternative Explanations
Data connection tabs work - CSV/Excel, Paste Data, Google Sheets, Database tabs switch correctly
Google Sheets and Database tabs show 'coming soon' messages as expected
All form inputs and UI elements are clickable and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix demo data inconsistencies: 1) Trust score should consistently show 34, 2) Claims count should be 16 not 32, 3) Filter counts should match expected values (4 verified, 7 wrong, 3 partial, 2 logic gaps). The demo data in /app/frontend/src/data/demoData.js appears to have correct values but the UI is showing different numbers.
